contactForm.title: We are here for you
contactForm.subtitle: Start taking advantage of all the benefits that Consolidator offers for your agency.
contactForm.placeholderMessage: The more describe you are in message, the better we can help you.

about-us.title: helps businesses move into the future through technology.
about-us.subtitle:
We are a group of experienced developers and business analysts who came together to create unique solutions for businesses.
Our goal is to make your business as digital and automated as possible.
We’ve worked across many industries and understand not only the technologies needed to solve problems, but also the real challenges you face every day.
In today’s world, one technology is no longer enough to solve all the challenges a successful business faces. Most IT companies think that if they have a hammer, everything looks like a nail. We believe that’s an outdated mindset.
Our mission is to build infrastructure around your business, where every tool is carefully chosen to solve a specific problem. While others think you must adapt your business to existing solutions, we believe that solutions must adapt to your business.
We believe every business is unique — even if you feel like you have many competitors. In today’s world of endless options, only a unique and memorable website design will help you stand out. And a system tailored to your vision will help you cut costs and become a market leader.
We don’t sell off-the-shelf solutions. We build exactly what you need.

projectTimeLine.analytic-text: The first stage is analyzing your business. We believe that an effective solution starts with a complete understanding of bottlenecks and problems — just like a doctor knows that no treatment can be prescribed without proper diagnostics.
projectTimeLine.Architecture-text: The second stage is designing the future system in collaboration with your business stakeholders. We build the architecture of the solution just like an architect plans the structure of a new home.
projectTimeLine.design-text: The third stage is designing your app or website. With your input and our expertise, we create a responsive and intuitive design that provides the best user experience — because users should instinctively know what to do.
projectTimeLine.developing-text: The final stage is development. Our approach involves breaking large tasks into small deliverables and keeping you engaged at every step. This ensures the product we build is tailored to your business needs.

ai.headline: Are you running your business — or is your business running you?
ai.subtitle: Every day you lose time, money, and control to routine that should have been automated a long time ago. Whether it's retail, manufacturing, or document workflow — the problems are the same.

cards.pain: Employees are drowning in manual data entry
cards.problem: Filling out cards, documents, reports, translations into a second language — hours of repetitive work every day. Manual entry errors cost money: wrong prices, lost orders, confusion in records.
cards.solution: AI processes documents, photos, and data — and fills in cards, descriptions, and specs on its own. In multiple languages, in seconds. All that's left is to review.

analytics.pain: "How's the business doing?" — and nobody knows for sure
analytics.problem: To get an answer, you need to open 1C, export to Excel, build formulas, wait for the accountant. By the time the numbers are ready, the decision has already been made by guessing.
analytics.solution: Ask the system in plain text: "What's the margin for November?", "Which facility costs the most?", "Compare performance of two departments." The answer comes in 5 seconds, with real numbers from your database.

sync.pain: Your systems live separately from each other
sync.problem: The warehouse doesn't know about the website. Accounting doesn't see production. CRM isn't connected to 1C. Data is entered twice, gets out of sync, and becomes outdated. Manual synchronization always means delays.
sync.solution: We connect all your systems in real time. Warehouse, website, accounting, CRM — data syncs automatically. Changed in one place — updated everywhere.

decisions.pain: Decisions based on gut feeling, not data
decisions.problem: Which employee is more efficient? Which direction is more profitable? Where's the bottleneck in production? Should you switch suppliers? Without analytics, it's just guessing.
decisions.solution: Dashboards with P&L, KPIs, cost analysis, workload, and trends — across any metrics that matter to you. You finally see your business in numbers, not gut feelings.

onec.pain: "We have 1C, we don't need anything else"
onec.problem: 1C stores data. But it doesn't build dashboards, doesn't answer questions, doesn't connect departments, and doesn't provide AI analytics. 1C is accounting — not a growth tool.
onec.solution: We don't replace 1C — we plug into it. Data automatically flows into analytics, dashboards, and external systems. Your usual accounting stays right where it is, with AI and automation on top.

cta.text: Legacy systems get more expensive every year — maintenance, patches, manual work keep eating your budget. The sooner you start, the cheaper the transition.
cta.subtext: The market doesn't wait. Companies that automate now are already moving faster and spending less.
